Bill.LongTitleEn: An Act to amend the Financial Administration Act and to make consequential amendments to other Acts (debt forgiveness registry)
Bill.LongTitleFr: Loi modifiant la Loi sur la gestion des finances publiques et d’autres lois en conséquence (registre de créances visées par une renonciation)
Bill.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Financial Administration Act and to make consequential amendments to other Acts (debt forgiveness registry)

Bill.StatusNameFr: À l'examen en comité au Sénat
Bill.StatusName: At consideration in committee in the Senate

WebReferences.TitleEn: Receiver General for Canada. “Debts, obligations and claims written off or forgiven.” In “Section 2: Supplementary information required by the Financial Administration Act,” Public Accounts of Canada 2025, Volume III: Additional Information and Analyses, 2025.
WebReferences.TitleFr: Receveur général du Canada. « Créances – radiations ou renonciations, » dans « Section 2 : Informations supplémentaires exigées par la Loi sur la gestion des finances publiques », Comptes publics du Canada 2025, Volume III : Informations et analyses supplémentaires », 2025.
WebReferences.Title: Receiver General for Canada. “Debts, obligations and claims written off or forgiven.” In “Section 2: Supplementary information required by the Financial Administration Act,” Public Accounts of Canada 2025, Volume III: Additional Information and Analyses, 2025.
